regions.name: Viti Levu
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to October offers the best weather with lower humidity and minimal rainfall.

regions.name: Vanua Levu
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to October is ideal for exploring this quieter northern island with pleasant weather.

regions.name: Western Division
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to October provides sunny days perfect for beach activities and water sports.

regions.name: Central Division
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to October offers the driest conditions for visiting the capital and surrounding highlands.

regions.name: Eastern Division
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to October provides the best sailing and diving conditions in this remote region.

regions.name: Northern Division
regions.bestTimeToVisit: May to October is best for reef diving and exploring the pristine outer islands.

top10.name: Nadi
top10.description: Home to Fiji's main international airport, Nadi is the gateway to the islands and a bustling coastal town with beachfront resorts and tourism infrastructure. It serves as the primary base for visiting the Mamanuca Islands and western Fiji attractions.

top10.name: Suva
top10.description: Fiji's capital and largest city, Suva is the cultural and economic heart of the country with vibrant markets, colonial architecture, and excellent museums. It serves as the main gateway for most visitors and offers authentic local experiences, diverse cuisine, and access to nearby natural attractions.

top10.name: Denarau Island
top10.description: A resort-filled island near Nadi connected by causeway, offering luxury accommodations, shopping, dining, and water sports facilities in a well-organized tourist enclave. It's the main jumping-off point for island-hopping tours and day trips to the Mamanuca Islands.

top10.name: Coral Coast
top10.description: A scenic stretch of beach between Nadi and Suva featuring white sand, clear waters, and numerous luxury resorts set against lush tropical vegetation. It's one of Fiji's most picturesque coastal regions, ideal for snorkeling, diving, and relaxation.

top10.name: Mamanuca Islands
top10.description: An archipelago of small islands west of Nadi known for pristine beaches, island-hopping tours, and water sports. Day trips and multi-day excursions make them highly accessible to international tourists.

top10.name: Lautoka
top10.description: Fiji's second-largest city and a significant port town known for its sugar industry heritage and authentic local atmosphere. Visitors can explore local markets, temples, mosques, and gain insight into daily Fijian life away from tourist areas.

top10.name: Savusavu
top10.description: A laid-back coastal town on Vanua Levu known for its hot springs, diving opportunities, and bohemian atmosphere with a thriving artist community. It's popular with divers, yachters, and travelers seeking a slower pace and excellent seafood in a scenic waterfront setting.

top10.name: Yasawa Islands
top10.description: A chain of volcanic islands northwest of Viti Levu famous for stunning beaches, lagoons, and budget-friendly island resorts. Backpackers and adventure seekers visit for sailing tours and snorkeling experiences.

top10.name: Sigatoka Sand Dunes National Park
top10.description: Fiji's only national park featuring extensive golden sand dunes stretching along the coast with archaeological significance and diverse coastal vegetation. The dramatic landscape offers hiking, excellent photography opportunities, and insights into Fiji's pre-colonial history.

top10.name: Nabouwalu
top10.description: A gateway port town for ferry services connecting to the southern islands and a transit point for island-hopping adventures. While primarily functional, it provides an authentic look at daily Fijian commerce and maritime culture.
